python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-02':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Pakistan is a regional state that could try to facilitate diplomacy if the fighting continues. A mediator may try to bring Iran together with another government for negotiations.

Title: Which country will President Donald Trump threaten to cut off all trade with by 5 March 2026 for refusing US base access in the war with Iran?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Some allied countries host US military facilities. If one of those countries refuses to allow those bases to be used in a new war, it could trigger a serious diplomatic and economic dispute with Washington.
---
